name: Ray Bauer's Swedish Rye Bread (Limpa)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Whole wheat or rye flour (your choice will affect the taste - I prefer wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients (using fresh seeds only) in 1 1/3 cups of boiling water and soak for a minimum of 1 hour. This pre-soaks the cracked wheat and pre-releases the other flavors.
2. Dump this mixture into a bowl and add the remaining ingredients.
3. Set your bread machine to White and bake at the medium setting. Alternatively, perform the normal knead and rise steps manually.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30 - 35 minutes. Test the doneness as oven temperatures may vary.
5. Makes 1 loaf
Contributed by Ray Bauer (Hacked into MM by Wesley Pitts especially for the FIDO Cooking Echo)
